tahini-rolls-lezzet.name: Tahini Rolls
instructions: 1. Release the Yufka on a flat ground.
2. Take the Tahini on the brush.

5. Wrap it in the form of rolls tightly starting from the serpin and short edge of walnut.
6. slice the roll with 2 fingers thickness and index to the oily paper serial tray.
7. Cook until the oven is fried to 180 degrees.
8. Spread the sugar on it and serve.

tais.name: Tais
instructions: Fill 2 glasses with ice.
Gently stir orange juice, pineapple juice, grenadine, and lime juice together in a small pitcher; stir in cream of coconut.
Mix rum and spiced rum together in a small glass. Pour rum mixture into the 2 glasses and top with orange juice mixture. Top off each glass with club soda.

tamales-in-green-sauce-recipe-comedera.name: Tamales In Green Sauce Recipe
tamales-in-green-sauce-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de tamales en salsa verde
instructions: We'll start our recipe by placing the corn leaves in warm water for 20 minutes.
In a saucer, we'll put them to a boil and chili till they're soft or till they change their color. Kill and let rest.
In a blender or mixer, you will add onion, both garlic teeth, cylintantrum branch, steaks and licks till everything's integrated.
It's time to put the chicken breast to a boil till it's soft. When I get back to you, you're gonna get her and get her back.
In a saucer, you'll add some oil and add the previous sauce, cook for 5 minutes.
Later, you'll add his chicken cube, his bawling chicken and mix up till everything's integrated. Let them cook for another 5 minutes. Turn and put them out.
In a bowl, add the pork butter and bat till it sponges.
Luego, agrega sal y 1/4 de cucharada de polvo de hornear, la harina para tamales y el caldo de pollo.
Mezcla muy bien hasta que te quede una masa manejable.

The water will be tested with a small ball of dough and put into a glass with water and see if it's floating. If she does, she means our mass's perfect and fluffy. If she sinks, she'll be so heavy and you'll have to do it again.
It's time to put our pits together, get the leaves that should be dry. You'll extend some of the dough, then at the centre you'll add the chicken. Close and tie with a string.
When you have them all ready, cook them for an hour in a vapour or use the tidal bath technique.
After that time, get them out and serve them with the green sauce where the chicken was cooked.
Enjoy!

taramosalata-of-argyros-argiro.name: Taramosalata Of Argyros

ingredients.item: 400 greoil soft (or mixture with sunflower oil)
400 greoil soft (or mixture with sunflower oil)

instructions: Cut the stale bread into pieces and add to a bowl.
Cover with plenty of water and place on top a weight (e.g. plate), so that it stays fully submerged and soak well.
Soak the crust as it adds extra flavor.
Leave for about 20 minutes.
Drain the bread very well, pressing it with your hands so that the excess moisture is gone.
Pour the bread into the mixer's bowl (or multi cutter).
Add the onion cut into pieces and the tarmac.
Beat well until the mixture is completely mashed and no pieces of bread or onion appear.
Add the freshly squeezed lemon juice and rebeat the mixture until homogenized.
With the mixer in operation, pour the oil slowly with a constant flow, like a “closer”, so that the taramosalata is primarily found and becomes critical text.
Add some water gradually until we achieve the desired texture (not too thick, not too fluid).
Mix a little finely chopped dill into the mixture, if we like it.
Try and if you want, add some extra lemon for a more acidic taste.
One or two tablespoons of olive oil at the end add extra flavor and flavor.
Serve the taramosalata cold, spreading the quantity with a spoon on a plate.
Add some olive oil and garnish with fresh dill or olives.
Ideally accompanied with fresh bread, crimson nuts or pies.
The homemade taramosalata is kept in the refrigerator, in a glass container with lid, for several days. Mix well before serving.

tater-tot-egg-bake-with-bitter-greens-sa.name: Tater Tot Egg Bake With Bitter Greens Salad

ingredients.item: . sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: halved through root end, thinly sliced

instructions: Whisk shallot, orange juice, vinegar, 3 Tbsp. oil, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl to combine; season dressing with pepper. Set aside.
Toast almonds in a dry 10" nonstick skillet (at least 2" deep) over medium-high heat, tossing occasionally, until golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a plate and let cool.

Wipe out skillet, pour in 2 Tbsp. oil, and reduce heat to medium. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally and reducing heat if needed, until very soft but without taking on any color, 10–12 minutes. Let cool slightly.
Meanwhile, whisk eggs in a large bowl with remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt; season with pepper. Fold in tater tots and let sit 10 minutes.

Fold onion into egg mixture (try to keep tater tots intact, but it’s okay if some break up). Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in same skillet over medium-high. Pour egg mixture into pan and flatten surface with a heatproof rubber spatula to make sure tater tots are mostly submerged. Reduce heat to low; cook, undisturbed, watching edges to make sure egg isn’t getting too brown, until golden underneath and top is only a little runny, 20–25 minutes.

Using spatula, loosen edges of egg. Wearing oven mitts, place a large plate upside down over skillet and swiftly flip over to turn egg out onto plate. If skillet is dry, add 1 Tbsp oil. Slide egg back into skillet, top side down, and cook until center is just set, about 5 minutes. Transfer back to plate; let cool if desired.
To serve, add radicchio, arugula, cheese, and nuts to reserved dressing and toss to combine; season with salt and plenty of pepper. Pile salad on top of tortilla.

teriyaki-salmon.name: Teriyaki Salmon
instructions: Bring 1½" water to a boil in a medium skillet. Season generously with salt; reduce heat to medium-low. Add salmon, skin side down, cover, and simmer gently until opaque throughout, 5–10 minutes. Transfer each piece to a medium bowl as finished; remove skin and pour teriyaki sauce over.
DO AHEAD: Salmon can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill.

terrific-turkey-chili.name: Terrific Turkey Chili

ingredients.prep: or coarsely chopped tomatoes packed in puree

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large stock pot over medium-high heat. Crumble turkey into the pot, stirring with a wooden spoon to break apart as much as possible. Season with taco seasoning mix, coriander, oregano, chili flakes, and tomato paste, and mix until meat is evenly coated with seasonings. Continue cooking, reducing heat if necessary, until turkey is well browned.

Pour in beef broth, and simmer to reduce liquid slightly, about 5 minutes. Add salsa, tomatoes, and green chilies, and continue cooking at a moderate simmer for ten minutes. Adjust the thickness at any time you feel necessary by adding water.

While chili is still cooking, heat one tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook onion and green bell pepper, stirring occasionally for 5 minutes, or until onion is translucent and bell pepper is lightly browned. Add onion and bell pepper to the chili, and continue cooking at a very low simmer.

In the same skillet, heat the remaining tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat. Add the zucchini, and cook stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes, or until lightly browned. Add the zucchini to the chili, reduce heat, and continue cooking 15 minutes more. Again, adjust the consistency with water as needed.
Ladle chili into serving bowls. Top with sour cream, green onion, and cheddar cheese, and serve.

the-barbecue-burger.name: The Barbecue Burger

ingredients.item: To 3 tablespoons kansas city sweet and smoky rub

ingredients.prep: sliced almost in half through the side

ingredients.item: To 8 tablespoons smoke wrangler’s barbecue sauce

ingredients.prep: soaked in water for 30 minutes, then drained

instructions: Form the ground beef into 4 patties, each about 3 1/2 inches across and 3/4-inch thick. Make a slight depression in the center. (Burgers rise more in the center than on the periphery, so the slight indentation helps give you an even thickness.) Generously season the burgers on both sides with the Kansas City Sweet and Smoky Rub and let marinate in the refrigerator while you light your grill.
Set up the grill for direct grilling and preheat to high. Brush and oil the grill grate.
Lightly brush the romaine lettuce leaves on both sides with olive oil (you’ll need about 1 tablespoon.) Brush the insides of the onion rolls with the remaining oil.
Arrange the bacon strips on the grill grate and grill until browned on both sides, 3 to 4 minutes per side. (Move them as needed to dodge any flare-ups.)
Grill the hamburgers until cooked to taste, about 4 minutes per side for medium (71°C on an instant-read thermometer.)
Grill the lettuce leaves over the hot fire until lightly browned, 30 seconds per side. Toast the onion rolls, cut side down, over the hot fire, 1 to 2 minutes.

To assemble, place a grilled romaine leaf on the bottom half of each onion roll. Top with a burger, then barbecue sauce, then a tomato slice, bacon, and more barbecue sauce. Top with the other onion roll half.

the-chicken-noodle-soup.name: The Chicken Noodle Soup
instructions: Make the chicken stock: Place the whole chicken, onions, celery, carrots, garlic, thyme, parsley, bay leaves, peppercorns, cold water, and salt in a large electric multicooker (such as Instant Pot). Pressure cook on high pressure for 45 minutes.
Quick-release the pressure, then carefully remove the chicken with tongs. Reserve the remaining stock and vegetables in the multicooker. Let the meat cool slightly, 5–10 minutes.

Remove the chicken meat from the bones. Set the skin and bones aside. Using your hands or 2 forks, shred the meat into bite-sized pieces. Reserve 3 cups of the shredded chicken for the soup. (Store any remaining meat in the fridge for up to 5 days, and reserve for another use.)

Carefully chop the chicken bones into smaller pieces using poultry shears or a heavy knife. Return the skin and bones to the stock-vegetable mixture in the multicooker. Pressure cook on high pressure for 45 minutes. Let the pressure release naturally, or use the quick-release.

Pour the stock mixture through a fine mesh strainer or cheesecloth into a clean heatproof pot or bowl. Discard the solids. Reserve 8 cups of the strained stock for the soup. (Store the remaining stock in the fridge for up to 5 days, and reserve for another use.)

Make the noodles: Place the flour and salt in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook attachment. Add the egg, yolk, and water. Beat on low speed for 1–2 minutes, until a shaggy dough forms, adding a few drops of additional water as needed to help it come together. Increase the mixer speed to medium, and beat for 6–7 minutes, until the dough is smooth and elastic. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap, and let it rest at room temperature for 20–30 minutes, until it presses in easily without springing back.

Attach the stand mixer pasta sheet roller to your stand mixer. Unwrap the rested dough, and cut it in half. Working with 1 dough piece at a time, roll the dough through the widest setting, folding and re-rolling it 2–3 times, until smooth. Continue rolling the sheet, reducing it by 1 notch at a time, until you reach level 5 thickness. Transfer the pasta sheet to a floured work surface. Repeat the process with the second dough piece.

Using a knife or pizza cutter, cut the pasta sheets into ½-inch-wide noodles (about 2 inches long). Dust the noodles lightly with flour, and set them aside to dry at room temperature while preparing the soup.

Make the soup base: Heat the oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add the onion, celery, carrots, and a pinch of salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 6–8 minutes, until the vegetables begin to soften. Add the garlic and thyme. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 1–2 minutes, until fragrant.
Pour in the reserved 8 cups of chicken stock and 3 cups of shredded chicken. Bring the mixture to a gentle boil over medium-high heat. Cook for 5–10 minutes, until the flavors meld.

Add the noodles to the soup base in the pot, gently shaking off any excess flour before dropping them in. Simmer, stirring occasionally, for 1–2 minutes, until the noodles are just tender and begin to float to the surface.
Remove the soup from heat. Stir in the lemon juice, parsley, and black pepper to taste. Serve with your favorite crusty bread.
Enjoy!

the-cracked-coffee-latte.name: The Cracked Coffee Latte
instructions: Melt the chocolate in a microwave-safe bowl in 30-second increments, stirring in between each time until fully melted.
Pour the melted chocolate into a clear plastic cup, and coat the inside. Allow any excess to drip back into the bowl. Freeze the cup for about 10 minutes to set the chocolate.
Assemble the drink: Fill the chocolate-coated cup to the top with ice cubes. Then pour in the sweetener, followed by the milk and freshly brewed espresso.
Gently squeeze the cup to crack the chocolate mold, then give the drink a stir.
Enjoy!

three-mushroom-risotto-lezzet.name: Three Mushroom Risotto
instructions: 1. Sauce onions and mushrooms in olive oil.
2. Add rice and continue roasting when color is pink.
3. Cook for 20 minutes by adding vegetable water and stirring continuously.
4. Take it from January and add grated parmesan cheese, butter and fine chopped parsley and mix quickly.
5. Serve.
6. Light weight, low-calorie and high-protein mushroom risotto recipe can reach here, color your tables.

Light bitter lovers can be a good alternative to to for dark flakes or chili flakes.
u can add a funr flavor by spreading the grated parmesan during the service.
If you want to increase the protein rate, you can add chopped sucuk in the meal.

instructions: 1. Tomatoes cube cubeunch or rende.
2. Take the pan into the pot and melt the butter.
3. Add yellowms and short processretracting the smell pushed out.
4. Add chopped tomatoes to the pan.
5. In the middle fire, a little bit of tomato juice and bake until it is lightened.
6. Add pepper, pepper and salt.

tiny-pecan-tarts.name: Tiny Pecan Tarts
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease two mini tart pans.
To make the crust: Combine butter and cream cheese in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until smooth and creamy. Add flour and mix to form a smooth dough.
Divide dough into 48 balls; place one ball in each greased cup of tart pans. Use your fingers or a tart tamper to press out into a tart shell.
To make the filling: Break eggs into a large bowl. Add brown sugar, pecans, melted butter, vanilla, and salt; mix until well combined. Spoon filling into prepared tart shells, filling each 3/4 full.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 30 minutes. Transfer tarts to a wire rack to cool completely.

toast-bread-argiro.name: Toast Bread

ingredients.item: 1 sachet dry yeast or 1 cube fresh
2 tsp honey or other sweetening matter
5 cup of flour strong for tsireki or bread
A little oil for the form
1 sachet dry yeast or 1 cube fresh
2 tsp honey or other sweetening matter
5 cup of flour strong for tsireki or bread
A little oil for the form

instructions: Mix the yeast (dry or fresh) in a bowl with honey and 1/3 cup. It's warm water. Cover the bowl and leave the mixture for 5 minutes, until the surface is foamed – sample that yeast is activated.
Add 4 cup mixer to the bowl. flour and open in the center of a puddle where add the mixture of activated yeast, the remaining lukewarm water and the soft butter.
Work the materials with the hook attachment for 2 minutes at low speed to blend. Turn the volume up and knead for 6-7 minutes, to unify the mixture.

Sprinkle with salt and gradually incorporate, spoonfuls, the rest of the flower, with the mixer Always in operation – not pour the flower at once because the whole mountain may not be needed. The dough at the end must be soft and elastic without sticking to the hands.

When she nurses in a malleable ball around the hook, we understand she's ready. Pack with your hands and transfer to a lightly oiled bowl with the components below. Cover it with kitchen wrap and towel and allow it to rise to room temperature (23-25°C) for about an hour and a half.
When doubled in volume, empty the dough on the counter and push it with your hands to deflate it and disengage any air bubbles created inside it.
Spread it with your hands on a thick leaf. Fold it into three by forming a long piece of dough which we wrap in a roll by pinching the compounds to stick together.
Touch the dough roll – with the components downwards – in a slightly oiled long and deep form 23 cm, ideal for toast bread.
Cover with clean towel and place the pan in the oven. Allow the bread to double in volume for about 45 minutes.
Finally, with the help of a brush, brush the bread with melted butter.
Bake in a well preheated ocean, at 200°C, in the air, on the bottom grill, for about 35 minutes.

Once cooked, remove the inflatable toast bread on the counter and rub it with the remaining butter. Allow it to stand for 10 minutes and then carefully remove it from the form and transfer it to a rack to cool completely.

toasted-walnuts-with-parmesan-and-aleppo.name: Toasted Walnuts With Parmesan And Aleppo Pepper
instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Whisk egg white in a medium bowl until soft peaks form. Fold in walnuts, Parmesan, sunflower seeds, amaranth, if using, Aleppo pepper, sugar, and salt.
Spread mixture in an even layer on a rimmed baking sheet and bake, tossing every 10 minutes, until mixture is dry and toasted, 20–30 minutes.

tofu-with-soy-butter-corn.name: Tofu With Soy-butter Corn

ingredients.item: . soy sauce; plus more for serving
Torn basil leaves and/or cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Wrap tofu in a kitchen towel and place in a shallow baking dish or on a rimmed baking sheet. Weigh down with a heavy object (a cast-iron skillet topped with a couple of heavy cans works well). Let sit at least 15 minutes and up to 1 hour (go the full time if you can).
Meanwhile, cut kernels from corn cobs. (Save cobs to make stock in the future.) You should have about 3 cups kernels; if you have much more, save for another use.

Unpack and unwrap tofu and transfer to a cutting board. Slice crosswise into 8–10 planks about ½" thick; pat dry. Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Working in batches if needed, fry tofu in a single layer until golden brown all over, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate and season lightly with salt.

Reduce heat to medium and add remaining 1 tsp. oil. Set a small handful of scallions aside for serving; add remaining scallions to skillet and cook, stirring often, until wilted and starting to brown, about 2 minutes. Add corn and cook, stirring, until kernels are well coated, about 2 minutes. Pour in mirin, 3 Tbsp. soy sauce, and 2 Tbsp. water and bring to a simmer. Nestle in tofu and cook until sauce reduces slightly, about 3 minutes. Swirl in butter and cook until sauce is glossy and coats tofu, about 2 minutes.

Set a few herbs aside for serving. Remove tofu mixture from heat and stir in remaining herbs. Sprinkle with gomasio and top with reserved scallions and herbs. Drizzle with sesame oil and more soy sauce if desired. Serve over rice.

tomato-and-peanut-sauce-brazilian-cuisin.name: Tomato And Peanut Sauce (brazilian Cuisine)
instructions: 1. Cooking recipes include eggplant, pumpkin, carrot, onions cooked in the grill.
2. 1 peel the shells of the coffee cup peanut and get from the oven in the teflon pan as lean.
3. Wash and repel 3 medium-sized tomatoes and pass through the strainer.
4. Add 10 gr butter in sauce sauce sauce pot and melted tomatoes.
5. Tomatoes cook until you pull light water.
6. Add 1 coffee cup cream and roasted peek.
7. Salt and pepper and cook for 1-2 minutes.
8. Leave it from January and cool.
9. Transfer the prepared sauce to the glass jar when cool.
10. You can keep 1 day in refrigerator.

ingredients.item: 1 cup of coffee galeta flour  u

toots-soft-almond-flour-cookies.name: Toots (soft Almond Flour Cookies)
instructions: Put blanched slivered almonds in a food processor and pulse a few times to break them up. Let the food processor run for about 5 minutes, or until you have an almond paste resembling marzipan. Transfer the paste to a medium bowl. Add the confectioners’ sugar and use a rubber spatula to combine. Gradually add the rosewater, little by little, and slowly and gently knead, so the dough just comes together. Put the dough in a resealable plastic bag or airtight container and let it rest at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Pour the granulated sugar into a small bowl and set aside.

After the dough has rested, if want to dye it with gel food coloring, divide it according to how many colors you’re using, and make sure you keep the dough covered, so it doesn’t dry out. Wearing gloves to avoid stains, flatten the dough onto a tray or platter. Put a small amount of gel on the tip of a knife, add it to the dough, and very gently knead the dough to distribute the color throughout. If you need more food coloring, add it in small amounts, gently kneading it through, so the dough doesn’t get too moist and sticky.

After tinting the dough, or after your undyed dough has rested, shape your toots. Using your hands, pinch a ½ inch (1.25 cm) size ball from the dough, and roll it into an oblong shape (like a mulberry or blackberry), using your fingers to press and pinch the dough into the right shape.
Press a slivered pistachio or almond into the top or bottom side of each toot. One by one, place the toots in the sugar and roll them around to coat. Repeat until you’ve used all the dough.
Arrange the toots on a platter and serve alongside warm tea. Toots will keep in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 week.

tortilla-soup-mexican-recipe-comedera.name: Tortilla Soup, Mexican Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 taza de queso blanco fresco (para cortar)
Pimienta negra molida o pimienta blanca

instructions: We'll start with the chicken breast. Now with the clean meat, we'll warm up a pot with just more than a liter of water and we'll put it to cook with a touch of salt, a phis and a leaf of bay.
Mientras se cocina el pollo, podemos aprovechar para preparar otros ingredientes. En el caso de las tortillas, las cortaremos en cintas.
We will also cut the onion (peeling) into cubes and in the case of garlic teeth, we will peel them and mince them finely.
Then we'll heat up a frying pan with oil and high heat. With great care, we will fry the tortilla juiana, just as long as necessary to get them to golden and get crispy.
Then we'll get our omelets out of the oil. It's best to move them to a plate covered with absorbing paper to remove their excess fat.
Take care of the oil and hot frying pan to also fry the pieces of onion and garlic, this time with fire between and under.
Meanwhile, in a hot water bowl, remove the pasilla chilies, already clear. Instead, add them already cut into pieces and without seeds (except if you love the strong spicy).
At the same time, stay focused so that after about 15 or 20 minutes of boiling, you remove the chicken from the heat and its pot and only retain the stock.
Wash the tomato and cut them into small pieces. When the onion of the frying pan begins to become clear, it incorporates these pieces and also adds two of the moist chiles.
Mix well all the frying pan ingredients, cook five more minutes and then put them to a beaker or kitchen robot. Produce them to get a tomato purée as homogenous as possible.
Then we have to add the purée to the broth. Mix well and let it cook till it's broken. Then put the fire down to a minimum.

Take care of the frying pan where the tomatoes were cooked, to fry the third of the pasilla chilies, already cut into strips. It's only necessary to cook quickly to mark the taste and have a somewhat crisp texture.

Reserve the fried chili and prepare the other ingredients to decorate soup plates. We'll have to cut the avocado into cubes as well as the cheese. It measures a cup of the latter, already in pieces, to get as much as necessary.
Salpimenta las cintas de tortilla.

At the time of serving, we will place a portion of the decoration ingredients at the bottom of each plate: some fried omelette ribbons, some cheesebes and avocado, some fried chili strips. If you wish, a little chicken breast cut into pieces or cuts may be included. Then you have to put the soup onto each plate and at the end, decorate the surface with another little tortilla, avocado, cheese and chili, and additionally a touch of milk cream and some drops of lemon juice (optional).

traditional-basque-bonito-marmitako-reci.name: Traditional Basque Bonito Marmitako: Recipe
traditional-basque-bonito-marmitako-reci.original_name: Marmitako de bonito vasco tradicional: receta fácil
instructions: To start preparing the marmitako, the most important thing is to take care of the beautiful. It should be clear and clear with no skin and thorns and ready for us to cut with a good sharp knife.
Then we're gonna need a big, nonstick frying pan. That's where we'll get an oil jet.
Once the oil's hot, let's add the pieces of pretty. We'll cook them only what's necessary to seal them throughout their surface. That process should be very quick.
Then we will remove the fish from the frying pan and optionally we can place them on a plate covered with an absorbent paper sheet to remove excess fat.

Then we'll get care of the vegetables. Before we start with this stage, we'll put up a small pot with half full of water. We'll do this and cook the tomatoes quickly later. Then we'll peel the onion and get them into small pieces. In the case of potatoes, we will also skin them and mince them into large cubes.

Enseguida nos haremos cargo de los pimientos. Los lavaremos bien, retiraremos la cabeza y los abriremos para sacar las semillas y cortar la vena, o parte interna blanca. Luego, los picaremos en cuadros.
Then we'll wash the tomatoes and with hot water in the pot, we'll let them cook for two minutes.
Pasado este tiempo, apagaremos la olla, sacaremos los tomates y con cuidado de no quemarnos, separaremos la piel del resto del fruto. Luego, los picaremos en trozos medianos.
The following will be to get a big saucer to cook the marmitako. We'll warm her up with a generous jet of oil at medium heat.

Once the oil's hot, we'll drink the onion for a few minutes, stirring constantly. After this time, we will add the pepper and let the whole be cooked 4 more minutes, stirring often and keeping them from burning.

After this time, we're going to get tomato and mix and cook for another couple of minutes. Then it will be time to add the pits of potatoes. We'll let them cook another 5 minutes, and then have salt and pepper with them to taste, before they mix them all back.

Now let's have a bath with the wine and cook 3 minutes so that the alcohol evaporate a little. After this time we'll have to put up with the fish stock. Ideally, cover the level of solids in the saucer. If this doesn't happen, we can add some water to make up for, or some more fumet if we have more available.
Then we'll let the set cook for 30 minutes. Special care to avoid evaporate to the point where the plate will dry.
Once this time's up, we'll check that the potatoes are tender. If for some reason this isn't the case, we'll let them cook some more minutes.
Later, we will check and if necessary we will correct with more salt or pepper. If we do this last, we'll mix everything up again.
Finally, we will add the pieces of fish to the pot, and we will let them cook another 5 minutes, just so that the pretty one gets hot.
That's all. Our beautiful marmitako's ready to serve.

trenton-tomato-pie-pizza.name: Trenton Tomato Pie Pizza

ingredients.item: Food processor pizza dough or prepared pizza dough
A pizza stone or 2 stackable rimmed baking sheets

instructions: Place a rack in lowest position of oven. Set pizza stone or 2 stacked, inverted baking sheets on rack; preheat oven to 260°C at least 1 hour.
Drain tomatoes in a colander. Crush into small pieces with your hands, drain again, and transfer to a medium bowl. Stir in salt; set aside.
Roll out dough to a 14" circle on lightly floured parchment paper, making sure dough is evenly thin from center to edge; if dough pulls back when rolling, cover with plastic wrap and wait 5 minutes.
Transfer parchment with dough to a pizza peel, large cutting board, or inverted baking sheet. Sprinkle with 1 1/4 cups cheese. Top with tomatoes. Sprinkle with remaining 1/4 cup cheese.
Carefully slide parchment with pizza onto hot baking stone. Bake pizza until crust is deep golden brown, 10–12 minutes.
Transfer pizza to a cutting board and let cool 2 minutes. Drizzle with oil and cut into wedges. Serve with red pepper flakes, if using.

truffles-of-the-lazy-argiro.name: Truffles Of The Lazy

ingredients.item: 4 tablespoons of black chocolate or chopped sugar-free chocolate
4 tablespoons of black chocolate or chopped sugar-free chocolate

instructions: Place all the ingredients in a bowl.
Mix the ingredients with spoon until they are combined and we can make them into energy truffles.
Make small bites and add them to a platter.
Dip the healthy truffles half into melted chocolate or garnish with chocolate lines.
Keep the vegan recipe for truffles in the refrigerator and enjoy them any time we want a sweet bite that will fill us with energy.

turkey-laksa-noodle-soup.name: Turkey Laksa Noodle Soup

ingredients.item: Laksa paste (such as por kwan) or red curry paste
Rice vermicelli or thin egg noodles
Cilantro leaves with tender stems and lime wedges

instructions: Peel 8 oz. large shell-on shrimp and place shells and tails in a large heavy pot. Devein shrimp; pat dry with paper towels. Place on a plate and chill until ready to use.

Add 1 turkey or chicken carcass and 4 cups low-sodium chicken broth to pot, then pour in 6–8 cups water so most of carcass is covered. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer, pushing down or turning carcass occasionally and skimming foam from surface as needed, until broth is reduced slightly, 20–30 minutes.

Using tongs, carefully transfer carcass to a platter. Using a fine-mesh sieve,
scoop out shrimp shells and tails; discard. Set broth aside. Let carcass sit until cool
enough to handle, then pull meat from bones, discarding any skin, and shred. Set meat
aside; discard carcass.

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Add ½ cup laksa paste or red curry paste and cook, stirring often and reducing heat if starting to spatter too much, until deepened in color and oil is absorbed, about 2 minutes. Slowly add one 13.5-oz. can coconut milk, stirring in thicker coconut cream from top first before pouring in remaining milk. Pour in 8 cups reserved broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until flavor is concentrated, 10–15 minutes.

Add chilled shrimp, 10–12 puff tofu, halved, and reserved turkey meat; simmer until shrimp are just cooked and turkey and puff tofu are heated through, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat; stir in 2 Tbsp. fish sauce and ½ tsp. sugar. Taste and season with kosher salt and/or more sugar or fish sauce if needed.

Meanwhile, cook 8 oz. soybean or mung bean sprouts in a medium pot of boiling water until just tender (you want them to still have some bite), about 30 seconds. Using a sieve or slotted spoon, transfer to a colander and rinse under cold running water.
Return water in pot to a boil and cook 8–10 oz. rice vermicelli or thin egg noodles according to package directions; drain and rinse under cold running water.

Divide noodles and bean sprouts among bowls. Ladle soup over, making sure to get some shrimp, puff tofu, and turkey in each bowl and top with some cilantro leaves with tender stems. Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

turkey-recipe-stuffed-with-foie-gras-com.name: Turkey Recipe Stuffed With Foie Gras
turkey-recipe-stuffed-with-foie-gras-com.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno con foie gras

ingredients.item: Hierbas frescas (romero, tomillo, y salvia)  (al gusto)
250 ml de caldo de pavo o pollo
1 cda de harina de trigo  ((opcional, para espesar) )

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 and 3. Wash the turkey and dry it well. Fits the butter melted throughout the skin and Saxony with salt and pepper.
Coloca las hierbas frescas en la cavidad del pavo para darle aroma.
In a frying pan, melt the butter and skip the onion and garlic until transparent.
Add the apple and chestnuts and the broken foe gras. Cooking for 5 minutes till the foie gras melt slightly.
Agrega el pan de brioche y el caldo de pollo. Remueve bien para que los ingredientes se integren y sazona con sal, pimienta y perejil.
Filling the turkey with this mixture, ensuring that it isn't too tight to allow a uniform cooking.
Put the turkey on a baking plate and cover with an aluminum paper.

Bake the turkey for about 4 hours, or until internal temperature reaches 75 ″ 3 ″ (as measured at the thickest part of the breast). He scatters his turkey with his juices every 30 to 45 minutes to keep him juicy.
Retire the foil paper in the last 30 minutes of cooking to glow the skin.

Once the turkey has been cooked, remove the juice from the plate and mix with white wine and broth. It leads to boiling in a saucer and reduces to low heat, allowing it to weigh. If you prefer a thicker texture, add the flour and remove well.
Let his turkey stand up for about 15 minutes before we trench him. Serves in slices with salsa.

3. Remove olive oil from the pots and gently shackle in the pan.
4. Remove half of the meats that have been cheered to the eggplant.
5. Add the peppers in a row according to color changes.
6. Close up with the remaining hindi meats.
7. Spread the olive oil with brush and sprinkle it.
8. Add them to pepper.
9. Place the prepared hindi meat into the oiled oven tray.
10. Cook until the oven with adjustable to 200 degrees is light.
11. 11. Serve.
